description: People-finding patterns — optimized search queries for locating employees by role at target companies. Round 1 baseline testing across LinkedIn, data platforms, company sites, media, and creative sources.

variants.template: site:linkedin.com/in {{company_name}} founder OR CEO OR co-founder
{{company_name}} founder OR CEO OR president -jobs -careers -salary
{{company_name}} founder OR CEO site:crunchbase.com OR site:pitchbook.com
site:{{domain}} founder OR CEO OR team OR about
{{company_name}} CEO OR founder interview OR podcast
{{company_name}} "founded by" OR "co-founded" OR "started by"
{{company_name}} CEO OR founder site:rocketreach.co OR site:zoominfo.com
{{company_name}} founder site:wellfound.com OR site:theorg.com
site:linkedin.com/in {{company_name}} CTO OR CPO OR CISO OR CIO
{{company_name}} CTO OR "chief technology officer" OR CPO -jobs -careers
{{company_name}} CTO OR CPO site:crunchbase.com OR site:rocketreach.co
site:{{domain}} CTO OR "chief technology" OR leadership
{{company_name}} CTO OR CPO interview OR podcast OR talk
{{company_name}} CTO OR "chief technology" site:github.com OR site:linkedin.com/in
site:linkedin.com/in {{company_name}} CMO OR CRO OR CFO OR COO

categories.name: Head of Department (Growth / CS / Ops / Revenue)
